artist.name: Mikaelleon
artist.status: 3rd year college student (BSIT, University of Batangas, Lipa Campus)

commission_pricing.currency_note: USD via PayPal/Ko-fi (international), PHP via GCash/Maya/Bank Transfer QR PH (local PH)
commission_pricing.exchange_rate: 1 USD = ~₱58.50 PHP (check Config sheet for current rate)

payment_terms.above_threshold: Orders above $25 USD / ₱500: 50% downpayment before work begins, 50% upon completion
payment_terms.at_or_below_threshold: Orders at $25 USD / ₱500 and below: full payment upfront
payment_terms.installment_plans: Available for fully-rendered illustrations, character reference sheets, profile banners, and large-scale projects only

turnaround_time.note: TAT may vary depending on character complexity and queue position

custom_commission_pricing.note: Custom commissions = designing character from scratch or outfit adaptation

ko_fi_listing.name: April 2026 Supporter Special — Colored Sketch Doodle Page
ko_fi_listing.includes: 1 Full Body, 2 Half Bodies, 1 Chibi Full Body
ko_fi_listing.type: Surprise Me commission (no WIP previews, artist messages only when complete)

addons.Outfit Variation (same character, differ: +$10 (adds an extra full body to the page)

ko_fi_listing.addon_note: Add-ons apply per character. If multiple characters, each is assessed individually.

what_i_draw: NSFW / R-18 (adult characters only, eligible clients only)
what_i_do_not_draw: NSFW involving underage characters or real-life people

eligibility: Not commissioning from a Discord server rated 16+ or below
Explicitly stated age (18+) in social media biography
Willing to provide proof of age upon request
nsfw_policy.privacy: NSFW work not posted publicly without explicit written permission from client
hard_limits: No NSFW of characters who are or appear underage
No non-consensual or coercive scenarios presented approvingly
No minors in any romantic or sexual context even if aged up

refund_policy.artist_cancellation: Full refund regardless of stage; client may receive partial files upon mutual agreement

milestones.3: Free Sketch Icon (500x500px) on next order
milestones.7: Free Colored Sketch Bust Up on next order
milestones.8: Priority queue access on next order
milestones.10: Free SR Half Body + permanent 10% loyal client rate

loyalty_card_program.id_format: MIKA-MMYY-XXXX (based on issue date and sequential number)
loyalty_card_program.expiry: Cards do not expire. Stamps may be forfeited on cancellation, refund, or blacklisting.
loyalty_card_program.terms: One stamp per completed and fully paid commission. Non-transferable. Discount codes are single-use.

weekly_free_art_event.title: Weekly Free Art Requests & Giveaways

entry_mechanics.step_1: Follow, like, and repost TikTok video (+1 entry, required)
entry_mechanics.step_3: Mention a friend in comments (+1 entry each mention, optional)
entry_mechanics.step_4: Submit character reference via Google Form or Facebook DMs (required)

weekly_free_art_event.entries: Cumulative - entries carry over each week
weekly_free_art_event.week_2_note: Delayed due to technical issue (unable to view reposts). Week 1 participants auto-entered into Week 2 draw. From Week 3: clients must comment confirming all steps completed.
weekly_free_art_event.consolation: Non-selected entrants will receive quick sketches as compensation

files_created.commission_prices_v2.xlsx: Formula-driven price matrix with 8 sheets including Price Tables, Bundle Calc, Normal, Chibi, Surprise Me, Doodle Pages, Discount Codes. 783 formulas, 0 errors.
files_created.commission_prices_v2.docx: Word document with all price tables, GCash promo, disclaimer, payment notes, discount codes. 838 paragraphs, 0 errors.
files_created.price_matrix.xlsx: Simple price matrix for illustration sizes x rendering styles in USD, PHP, and GCash. Includes Add-ons sheet with Additional Character calculator. 86 formulas, 0 errors.
files_created.loyalty_tracker.xlsx: 4-sheet loyalty program tracker: Loyalty Tracker (main), Milestones reference, Discount Code Log, Summary Dashboard. 137 formulas, 0 errors. ID format: MIKA-MMYY-XXXX.

commission_process_steps: 1. Initial sketch sent to client for review (up to 2 free revisions at this stage)
2. Base color checks and design revisions after sketch approval
3. Final rendering begins after final approval (no significant changes permitted after this point)
4. Non-background orders include simple shapes/gradients as default background
5. WIP screenshots available upon request at any time
6. Watermarked preview sent for final confirmation before delivery
7. Remaining balance (50%) collected before full file delivery
8. High-resolution PNG delivered via email or preferred contact method

commercial_use_includes: Monetized content (YouTube, Twitch, paid social media)
Licensing or sublicensing to third parties
commercial_use_excludes: Personal use as profile picture or wallpaper
Sharing on personal social media with proper credit
complex_character_applies_to: Multiple patterns or textures (plaid, scales, lace, embroidery)
Non-human or hybrid features (wings, multiple limbs)
Large-area markings, tattoos, or body paint
Lots of small design elements (buckles, straps, chains)
important_notes.file_retention: Artist retains copy for 30 days after delivery. After this, re-delivery not guaranteed.
important_notes.exclusivity: Artist will not resell, reuse, or reproduce the same composition for any other client without written permission.

facebook_automations.instant_reply: Greeting with commission hours and portfolio link

session_notes.conversation_summary: This session covers the full setup of Mikaelleon's digital art commission business infrastructure including: pricing system, TOS, Google Forms (standard and NSFW), Ko-fi listing, Facebook/Instagram automations, Discord free art event, loyalty card program, client management templates, email drafts for all major scenarios, spreadsheet files, and active client tracking. The artist is a 22-year-old Filipino college student running commissions alongside studies.
session_notes.currency_disclaimer: USD prices are higher than PHP because PayPal deducts fees from transactions and withdrawals. GCash/local PHP prices reflect actual amount received after deductions.
session_notes.april_2026_promo: 1KSPECIAL promo - discounted base prices running in April 2026
